subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Bembepo lwimbo ne kulumbulula byambo bya neema bijimo.
topics: Bafunda bembe lwimbo ne kulumbulula byambo bya nema bijimo.
Bipimo bya ñyingijilo bya ketekelwa kubiwa mo kyafwainwa
Kulumbulula byaambo biji mu lwimbo kwesakanya na jishimikila.
